chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1473 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7167/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12-01-2022 Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing; whereas, report / statement has been filed on behalf of the Investigating Officer, wherein it is stated that the case has been challaned. In view of this position, this Petition has become infructuous and is accordingly dismissed with pending application; whereas, the Petitioner may approach the Trial Court to seek appropriate remedy. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
